title: Minecraft Perfected To The Max
description: Minecraft is best with mods but these are the best ones
body: A mod that adds a perfect list of vanilla mods makes your gaming experience 101 percent better. The mods do not make Minecraft into a different game with crazy chaos and the mods also do not make the game plain, boring, complicated, low fps, and not fun. Minecraft Perfected is a great balance between the two, and it is still all client-side mods.
